title: Position Boost Day 4
note: 8 pages in positions 8-50 identified for position boosts. Applied intro improvements, internal link additions, and strengthened calculator connections. Focus on pages supporting calculator hub rankings.

boosts.boost: Title already improved Day 1 ($405.53 in title). Now has reciprocal link from loan-calculator hub in calculator-blog-links.ts — strengthens ranking signal.
boosts.expected_impact: Higher ranking from internal link equity flowing from loan-calculator hub page

boosts.boost: Guide already fixed Day 1. Now benefits from retirement-planning hub's expanded blog links (+1 new blog link). Available from retirement-planning calculator page.
boosts.expected_impact: Improved crawl discovery from calculator hub cross-links

boosts.boost: Tool page title already improved Day 1. Now mortgage-affordability hub has 4 new blog links and 2 new decision links — stronger internal link graph.
boosts.expected_impact: Better ranking potential as mortgage-affordability hub gains authority

boosts.boost: Blog post now linked from mortgage-affordability calculator hub. Strong title with exact numbers. Internal link from calc page adds ranking equity.
boosts.expected_impact: Position improvement from calculator hub cross-link authority

boosts.boost: Added 401k-calculator and investment-return to relatedCalculators. Now linked from investment-return and retirement-planning hubs. Content covers withdrawal formulas with high topical authority.
boosts.expected_impact: Better ranking for 'investment calculator withdrawals' queries

boosts.boost: Decision page already has strong calculatorLinks. Now linked from debt-payoff and investment-return hub pages. Multi-hub internal links boost crawl priority.
boosts.expected_impact: Improved discovery and ranking for 'pay off student loans or invest' queries

boosts.boost: High-quality guide-style blog post. Added debt-payoff to relatedCalculators. Now linked to from both credit-card-payoff and debt-payoff hubs. Content covers snowball, avalanche, and balance transfer strategies.
boosts.expected_impact: Better ranking for credit card payoff and debt payoff queries

boosts.boost: Decision page now linked from budget-planner hub (new decision link added). calculatorLinks covers budget-planner, savings-goal, debt-payoff. Strong topical cluster.
boosts.expected_impact: Improved position for 'how much emergency fund' queries via calculator hub authority

cross_link_impact.mechanism: Internal link equity flows from calculator hub pages (high authority) to blog/decision pages (ranking targets) via reciprocal link structures in calculator-blog-links.ts and calculator-decision-links-v10.ts
